ANKIT PACHORI

Delhi NCR, India | +91-XXXXXXXXXX | ankit.pachori@gmail.com | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/ankitpachori



PRODUCT & PLATFORM TRANSFORMATION LEADER

Enterprise Acquisition Modernization | Platform Strategy | Global Digital Transformation | BFSI & Fintech Ecosystems



PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Senior Product & Platform Leader with 15+ years of experience driving enterprise acquisition modernization, global digital platform transformation, and regulated fintech ecosystem delivery. Proven track record leading end-to-end product lifecycle from concept through market rollout and regulatory approval, delivering commercially successful, compliant, and scalable customer acquisition platforms.

Expert in defining product strategy, platform roadmaps, and international market migration strategies across multi-LOB enterprise environments. Strong experience partnering with Technology, Lines of Business, and Control Management to drive New Product Approval (NPA), external partner integrations, and platform governance frameworks.

Recognized for building high-performing distributed teams, driving analytics-led product evolution, and evangelizing Platform-as-a-Product operating models across enterprise ecosystems.

POONAWALLA FINCORP

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

POONAWALLA FINCORP

Deputy Vice President – Product & DeliveryFeb 2025 – Apr 2025

Key Impact: - Led modernization of digital customer acquisition ecosystem for education lending platform through API-led integrations and onboarding automation. - Owned end-to-end product lifecycle including roadmap, feature prioritization, release governance, and production rollout. - Defined commercial success metrics including acquisition conversion, onboarding TAT reduction, and cost per acquisition optimization. - Owned platform health KPIs including availability, security compliance,

KPIs including availability, security compliance, integration reliability, and data governance adherence. - Partnered with risk, compliance, and control functions to ensure regulatory readiness and audit compliance. - Led cross-functional teams across product, engineering, QA, and partner integrations.

TATA CAPITAL LTD

Assistant Vice President – Digital Product PlatformsAug 2021 – Dec 2024

Key Impact: - Led digital acquisition platform strategy across personal loans and assisted lending journeys. - Delivered ecosystem integrations including Account Aggregator, DigiLocker, e-NACH, and KYC partner platforms. - Contributed to New Product Approval readiness through structured product documentation, risk reviews, and compliance alignment. - Enabled analytics-driven product decisions improving onboarding conversion and reducing drop-offs. - Implemented platform governance frameworks

- Implemented platform governance frameworks covering integration reliability, data security, and regulatory reporting. - Led and mentored cross-functional teams of 8–15 members across product, delivery, and partner integration functions.

Senior Manager – Digital Lending PlatformsMay 2019 – Aug 2021

Key Impact: - Owned product requirements and user journey design for digital lending acquisition journeys. - Delivered AI-driven credit decisioning integrations improving approval speed by 30%. - Reduced onboarding drop-offs by 25% using data-driven funnel optimization strategies. - Led cross-LOB collaboration across risk, underwriting, technology, and business stakeholders.
